action.reasoning: Observation: val_bal_acc reached 0.836 but test bal_acc stuck at 0.552 (best still 0.5657 from iter2); rare classes (bird/squirrel/bobcat/rabbit) highly unstable across runs (e.g. bird 0.07-0.85). Curves show good source convergence but persistent DG gap. Analysis: Focal loss + aggressive RandAugment (mag=15) help val but cause overfitting to source domains/lighting; CLIP-ViT backbone strong but needs milder augs, stochastic depth, label smoothing+CE, adjusted LR/WD for stability on rare classes. Decision: Incremental update - add drop_path_rate=0.1 to model, milder train augs (mag=9,ops=2,less jitter/blur), switch to CE+label_smoothing=0.1 (remove Focal), keep sampler, set lr=2e-5/wd=0.02/epochs=20, enhance TTA in predict (add vflip). Train then submit_eval to test improvement within ~40min remaining.
